rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Bitsadmin to Uncommon IP Server Address

rules.rule_text:
title: Bitsadmin to Uncommon IP Server Address
id: 8ccd35a2-1c7c-468b-b568-ac6cdf80eec3
status: test
description: Detects Bitsadmin connections to IP addresses instead of FQDN names
references:
- https://isc.sans.edu/diary/Microsoft+BITS+Used+to+Download+Payloads/21027
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-06-10
modified: 2022-08-24
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1071.001
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1197
- attack.s0190
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-useragent|startswith: Microsoft BITS/
    cs-host|endswith:
    - '1'
    - '2'
    - '3'
    - '4'
    - '5'
    - '6'
    - '7'
    - '8'
    - '9'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
